title: senecio othonniflorus
intro: Senecio othonniflorus, also known as common cineraria or dusty miller, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Consuming Senecio othonniflorus has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and improving digestion. Senecio othonniflorus can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be monitored due to potential toxicity.
